rationale: Adding deserialization support for non-self-describing formats; feature addition, no spec rule violated.
Performance improvement eliminating redundant clones; internal implementation, no spec area.
Display formatting ergonomics for Document; mentions serde_json/shell but not a MongoDB driver spec rule.
Rust API design change moving trait bounds; no spec area involved.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1633; proactive spec-rollout work, driver not previously wrong.
Internal code quality fix (iterator vs HashSet::contains); no spec area.
BSON Extended JSON spec: years >9999 use canonical format; driver uses relaxed for years up to 99,999 due to typo.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1819; proactive spec-rollout, not a driver bug.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1820; proactive spec-rollout, not a prior nonconformance.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1720; proactive Stable API spec-rollout work.
Rust u32/u64 to BSON type mapping overflow; BSON spec doesn't mandate specific Rust language-type mappings.
Sessions spec requires verifying session was created on same client; driver does not perform this check.
Crash when decimal128 feature flag disabled; implementation bug, no specific BSON spec rule about crashing.
ObjectId spec requires 5 random bytes; driver generates only 3 (first and last always 0 due to bug).
BSON decimal128 spec requires BID encoding; decimal feature flag used DPD, producing invalid values other drivers decode wrong.
Performance optimization for raw BSON ObjectId deserialization; no spec behavior change.
Large async futures causing stack overflows; internal performance/memory issue, no spec rule.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1721; proactive load balancer spec-rollout, not a prior nonconformance.
Performance report: async insert_many slower than sync; performance issue, no spec area.
directConnection=true failing with hidden/secondary nodes; user-reported issue, no specific spec rule cited.
Sync find 18x slower than Python; performance issue. Mentions Python only for comparison benchmark, not spec divergence.
Documentation fix and struct visibility tweaks; API ergonomics, no spec behavior change.
Moving AWS auth behind a feature flag to reduce dependency weight; packaging decision, no spec violation.
Dependency bump for rand crate; no spec area.
Adding with_session endpoints to index management API; feature addition, no spec rule explicitly cited.
API simplification: dropping fields from createIndexes result for sharded/non-sharded compatibility; API ergonomics.
Flaky load balancing test failure (greenerbuild); CI stability issue, no spec rule violated.
Index management spec: 'Drivers MUST manually raise an error if commitQuorum specified on pre-4.4 server'; driver missing this check.
Removing deprecated StreamAddress type; cleanup, no spec behavior.
Rust serde is_human_readable trait implementation detail; not a BSON spec rule, Rust-specific API.
Dependency bump to bson 2.0.0; no spec behavior change.
Re-enabling disabled PLAIN auth connection string spec tests; test infrastructure fix to run existing spec tests.
Rust Clone derive macro limitation for Collection<T>; language-binding API issue, no spec area.
Race condition causing min_heartbeat_frequency test flakiness; CI/concurrency bug, no specific spec rule violated.
UUID spec requires Binary constructors for each UuidRepresentation; driver missing required spec-mandated constructors.
Avoiding redundant allocations in Collection::clone_with_type; performance, no spec area.
Internal refactor to use ServerAddress::parse for consistency; no spec behavior change.
Cursor errors when result count not divisible by batch size; cursor spec requires returning all results regardless of batch size.
topology_closed_event_last flaky test failure (greenerbuild); CI stability issue.
Server selection spec: secondaryPreferred must be forwarded to mongos via OP_MSG; driver follows outdated OP_QUERY wording.
Issue split from DRIVERS-1835; adding load balancer test case for SRV resolving to 0 hosts.
Feature implementation for hidden indexes; new feature addition, not a prior nonconformance.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1004; clarifying maxPoolSize=0 handling, proactive spec-rollout.
Internal test improvement: replace delay with SDAM event monitoring; test quality, no spec behavior change.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-1919; bumping maxWireVersion for MongoDB 5.1 compatibility.
Debug output leaking private fields including credentials; security/API issue, no spec rule about debug formatting.
Removing conditional module definitions for docs.rs compatibility; internal refactor, no spec behavior.
Bson::into_relaxed_extjson produces improper JSON for arrays; BSON Extended JSON spec defines array serialization format.
UUID serialization/deserialization broken; BSON UUID spec defines correct binary subtype encoding.
Read-write-concern spec: empty write concern means server default; driver sends empty write concern rather than omitting it.
